title: After the Tenno Sho (Spring): Bouncing Back

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin is overcome with frustration after
failing to leave her mark on the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan, however, fights through the
frustration and addresses her fans, making a
rousing declaration that reinvigorates not only
them but herself as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing this, Ines senses that Mejiro Ryan is on
another level from her, and begins to seriously
consider the way she engages with her supporters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In part to determine whether she has what it takes
to reach Ryan's level, Ines decides to throw
herself into training for the Takarazuka Kinen!
